<div style="font-size: 4rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 0;">crawlex</div>

# Stealth crawling without glue code

> Chrome-aligned HTTP/TLS impersonation, optional render escalation, persistent queues and NDJSON events.

- HTTP-first crawling with render-on-demand
- SQLite and filesystem persistence for resumable runs
- Discovery enrichment for robots, PWA, Wayback, DNS, favicon and certs
- JS wrapper for event-streaming automation

[Get Started](#/getting-started/quickstart.md)
[GitHub](https://github.com/forattini-dev/crawlex)
